articles.title: Live Updates: Vance says U.S. and Iran close but "not there yet" on initial deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz - CBS News
articles.description: With the Strait of Hormuz still gridlocked and war raging in Lebanon, Iran and the U.S. both say there's no agreement yet.
